markdown:
#  Resource Tracking And Project Financials Setup Guide 
Table of Contents 
##  Create a New Budget View 
  1. Navigate to the Company **Admin** tool.
  2. Under **Tool Settings** , click **Budget**.
  3. Click **Set Up New Budget View**. ![Set Up New Budget View](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/2b68f478c5f16a61d921e62aa189f407/e128bf0b7293ffb544c2976cad964655/set-up-new-budget-view.png?fm=webp)
  4. Under **Standard Views** , highlight **Procore Labor Productivity Cost**. ![Procore Labor Productivity Cost View](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/bbedd8d636dfbcca659eda70c8544564/3c5331ce63105534b5dca14b8a61041c/procore-labor-productivity-cost-view.png?fm=webp)
  5. Click **Create**.
  6. Name your view as follows:
     * **View Name**. Enter a name for your new view. In this example, we named it: Labor Productivity Cost
     * **View Description**. Enter a description for your view. In this example, we entered: Recommended view for labor cost productivity report
  7. Click **Configure Columns**. This opens the Configure Columns window pictured below. From this point, continue with Step 2: (Optional) Customize the Budget View.


[ ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/resource-tracking-and-project-financials-setup-guide/about-real-time-labor-productivity/)
[ Add Recommended Columns ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/resource-tracking-and-project-financials-setup-guide/add-recommended-columns/)
title: Resource Tracking And Project Financials Setup Guide - Create a New Budget View
description: How to set up your project and budget to leverage Procore's unit-based columns and Resource Tracking tools to track real-time labor costs on a project's budget line items. | Create a New Budget View
